data.body: D4 resolved (reviewer decision): plain-docker-compose hang-recovery uses the willfarrell/autoheal sidecar — HEALTHCHECK marks the container unhealthy on a stale local heartbeat; autoheal (watching Docker health state, socket mounted read-only) restarts the autoheal=true-labeled container. Noted as a new stack dependency + Docker-socket attack-surface item for the deploy review. All 7 design decisions now resolved; re-running plan review on epic + S2/S4/S5.
